page_content:
Formerly: BSCV191.

CPCV230 College Park Scholars: Civic Engagement for Social Good Internship Practicum (3 Credits)

As the culmination of the CESG experience, students gain hands-on experience in an area related to civic engagement through internships in non-profit organizations, political engagement, community outreach, or research labs. The internship gives students authentic experiences that help them develop hard and soft skills to support their community engagement efforts and their work toward social good.

Restriction: Must be in College Park Scholars - Civic Engagement for Social Good (CPCV).

Credit Only Granted for. BSCV302 or CPCV230.
